case_title: TONY ASKANDAFI VS. CHARLES K. LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,550.00 FILED BY ASKANDAFI, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHARLES K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASKANDAFI, TONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, CHARLES K. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO WITHHOLD SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR THE PERFORMANCE OF THE LEASE AND AS TO COMPENSATION FOR DAMAGE TO THE PREMISES DURING PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY. LEASE DOCUMENTS ALSO PERMIT DEFENDANT TO CHARGE REASONABLE FEE FOR AGREEING TO ASSIGNMENT OF THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2019 BY JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TONY ASKANDAFI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES K. LEE IS PRESENT. WITNESS JERIES TANNOUS TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM
